mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_info ( project_name, description, budget, balance, status, leader_id, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{projectName}, #{description}, #{budget}, #{balance}, #{status}, #{leaderId}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_info WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0

SELECT p.id, p.project_name AS projectName, p.description, p.budget, p.balance, p.status, p.leader_id AS leaderId, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, u.real_name AS leaderName FROM project_info p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.del_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE project_info SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.project_name AS projectName, p.description, p.budget, p.balance, p.status, p.leader_id AS leaderId, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime, u.real_name AS leaderName FROM project_info p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.leader_id = u.id WHERE p.del_flag = 0
AND (p.leader_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm WHERE pm.project_id = p.id AND pm.user_id = #{userId} AND pm.del_flag = 0 ))
AND p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{requestDTO.searchText}, '%')
AND p.status = #{requestDTO.status}
AND p.leader_id = #{requestDTO.leaderId}
ORDER BY
p.budget
p.balance
p.create_time
p.update_time
p.status
p.create_time
DESC
ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
